free_text: Investigation of the (3He,a) reaction mechanism on the
12C nucleus.
English translation
Alpha-particles were registered by silicon
surface barrier detectors.
Targets were produced from carbon enriched in 13C
isotope up to 82%.
English translation was added.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
Subent 004 was split in three.
Carbon films with the thickness of 0.5 mg/cm2 were used
No information about source of uncertainty.
Fig.1 from Izv.Akad.Nauk,46(1982)897
SD: STATUS updated. Accuracy of digitized
data presentation revised.
Carbon films with the thickness of 0.5 mg/cm2 were used
Statistical errors are given
Fig.2 from Izv.Akad.Nauk,46(1982)897
SD: STATUS updated. Accuracy of digitized
data presentation revised.
No explanation of relative units is given.
ANG-AZ-RL is an azimuthal angle between reaction planes
ANG-RSL - ANG2 resolution.
Polar angle between a beam and 3He.
Polar angle between a beam and gamma-quantum.
Gamma-quanta were detected by scintillation
spectrometer with a NaI(Tl) crystal.
Carbon films with the thickness of 1.9 mg/cm2 were used
Digitizing error for ANG2
No information about source of uncertainty.
Fig.3 from Izv.Akad.Nauk,46(1982)897
SD: SF7=A/G -> G/A in REACTION code.

data presentation revised. Subent was split in three
according to azimuthal angle between reaction planes.
